[DQC.US.0140.9862] The reported fair value of Available For Sale Debt Securities Securities excluding interest of 3,579,758,000 does not match the calculated value of 3,582,154,000. This is comprised of the following: Amortized Cost of 4,012,265,000 Credit Loss on Securities of 2,396,000 Amortized Cost After Credit Loss 4,012,265,000 Gain on Securities 239,000 Loss on Securities of 430,350,000 The value of the amortized cost before the credit allowance and after the credit loss is the same with a value of 4,012,265,000, but a credit allowance has also been recognized with a value of 2,396,000. Review the filing to ensure a value for DebtSecuritiesAvailableForSaleAmortizedCostExcludingAccruedInterestAfterAllowanceForCreditLoss has not been used by mistake.
